inputs.label: Real part (cx)

inputs.label: Imaginary part (cy)

inputs.label: Maximum Iterations
inputs.businessContext: Maximum number of iterations before considering the point as part of the Mandelbrot set.

inputs.label: Escape Radius
inputs.businessContext: Radius threshold for escape condition; typically 2.

businessContext_i18n.tr: Kaçış koşulu için yarıçap eşiği; genellikle 2.
